applied_optimizations.name: Triton GELU kernel fusion
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented fused Triton kernel for GELU activation. Key fixes from failed attempt: (1) Replaced tl.math.tanh with manual implementation using tl.math.exp: tanh(x) = (exp(2x)-1)/(exp(2x)+1) with clamping to [-10,10]. (2) Removed is_cuda assertion for AMD compatibility. (3) Used BLOCK_SIZE=4096 (multiple of 64 for CDNA4 wavefront). (4) Explicit float32 casting on load and store.

top_bottlenecks: PyTorch uses 5+ separate elementwise kernels (mul, add, pow, tanh) with launch overhead

notes: Kernel fusion eliminates 4+ separate PyTorch elementwise kernels
AMD ROCm Triton requires manual tanh implementation via exp
BLOCK_SIZE=4096 works well for 8192x8192 tensor (67M elements, 16384 blocks)

global_notes: Level 1 Problem 88 (GELU activation) solved with Triton kernel fusion
Perfect SCORE: 100.0 achieved on first implementation attempt after fixing ROCm-specific issues
